sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70453" key="neo/xrhstos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεό-χρηστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diotog.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.96</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεόθρεπτα</foreign>).</entryFree>
